hero.title: Future Agriculture Starts Here
hero.subtitle: We build intelligent farms powered by technology, data, and innovation.

about.title: Cultivating the future of farming
about.lead: PURE LINE is an agricultural technology company transforming traditional farms into intelligent, data-driven operations.
about.whoText: A team of agronomists, engineers and data scientists building end-to-end smart farming systems for the modern Gulf.
about.whatText: We design, develop and operate smart farms — from IoT sensor networks and precision irrigation to satellite monitoring and AI analytics.
about.expertiseText: A decade of field experience across arid-climate agriculture, greenhouse engineering and agricultural digital transformation.
about.missionText: To make every farm more productive, more sustainable and fully connected — feeding the future with less water and less waste.

services.title: Complete smart-farming solutions
services.subtitle: Six integrated services covering the full lifecycle of a modern farm.

smart.title: Smart Farming Solutions
smart.desc: IoT-connected farms with real-time sensing, automation and AI-driven decisions.

development.title: Farm Development
development.desc: Turnkey design and construction of productive, future-ready agricultural sites.

irrigation.title: Advanced Irrigation Systems
irrigation.desc: Precision drip and smart irrigation that cut water use while boosting yield.

greenhouse.title: Greenhouse Solutions
greenhouse.desc: Climate-controlled greenhouses engineered for year-round high-value production.

consulting.title: Agricultural Consulting
consulting.desc: Expert agronomy, feasibility and optimization studies grounded in data.

digital.title: Agricultural Digital Transformation
digital.desc: Bring legacy farms online with dashboards, analytics and connected operations.

why.title: Built on expertise, driven by innovation

expertise.title: Industry Expertise
expertise.desc: Deep agronomy and engineering knowledge across arid-climate farming.

innovative.title: Innovative Solutions
innovative.desc: We pair proven agriculture with cutting-edge technology.

support.title: Reliable Support
support.desc: Dedicated teams and monitoring that keep your farm running.

sustainable.title: Sustainable Practices
sustainable.desc: Less water, less waste, and long-term soil and resource health.

technology.title: Modern Technology
technology.desc: IoT, satellite imaging and AI analytics built into every project.

results.title: Proven Results
results.desc: Measurable gains in yield, efficiency and profitability.

projects.title: Projects that redefine the field
projects.subtitle: A selection of smart farms, irrigation networks and greenhouse builds.

tech.title: The connected intelligence behind every farm
tech.subtitle: A unified technology stack that senses, decides and acts across your entire operation.

iot.title: IoT Sensors
iot.desc: Soil, moisture, climate and crop sensors streaming live field data.

irrigation.title: Smart Irrigation
irrigation.desc: Automated, weather-aware watering delivered exactly where it's needed.

satellite.title: Satellite Monitoring
satellite.desc: Multispectral imagery tracking crop health across every hectare.

ai.title: AI Analytics
ai.desc: Predictive models that forecast yield, disease and resource needs.

precision.title: Precision Agriculture
precision.desc: Variable-rate inputs applied plant-by-plant for maximum efficiency.

platform.title: PURE LINE FARM MANAGEMENT PLATFORM
platform.subtitle: One enterprise dashboard to monitor, control and optimize your entire farm in real time.

contact.title: Let's build your smart farm
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project and our team will get back within 24 hours.

footer.desc: PURE LINE is an agricultural technology company building intelligent, sustainable farms powered by data and innovation.
